meanings.definition: use of chemical analysis to estimate the age of geological specimens

examples: Tonight she is dating a former high school sweetheart

meanings.definition: assign a date to; determine the (probable) date of
examples: Scientists often cannot date precisely archeological or prehistorical findings

meanings.definition: date regularly; have a steady relationship with
examples: Did you know that she is seeing an older man?
He is dating his former wife again!

meanings.definition: provide with a dateline; mark with a date
examples: She wrote the letter on Monday but she dated it Saturday so as not to reveal that she procrastinated
